title: dennstaedtia distenta
intro: Dennstaedtia distenta, also known as the sensitive fern, is a type of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The medicinal properties of Dennstaedtia distenta include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues, among others. Dennstaedtia distenta is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
